description: US NOAA private remote sensing precheck (placeholder). Research-grade snapshot; not legal advice.

rules.title: NOAA private remote-sensing system authorization evidence
rules.authority: National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, Commercial Remote Sensing Regulatory Affairs
rules.source_reference: 51 U.S.C. chapter 601 (Land Remote Sensing Policy); 15 CFR Part 960 (Licensing of Private Remote Sensing Space Systems)
rules.finding_if_fail: A remote-sensing payload is declared but no NOAA authorization evidence is listed.
rules.limitations: Placeholder rule: the US-nexus test (US person / platform control) and the 2020 tiering system are NOT modelled - the rule fires on any remote-sensing payload. Rendezvous inspection cameras may or may not fall under Part 960. Requires legal review.
